environment_prompt: A dim industrial warehouse aisle with concrete floors dusted with debris and scattered packing foam. Tall metal shelving units line both sides stacked with cardboard boxes, forming a long corridor. Overhead sodium lights cast warm hard shadows. A red propane gas canister lies on the ground near a toppled wooden pallet. Open cardboard boxes and crumpled brown paper are scattered around. A thin haze of dust hangs low near the ground. Behind the viewer, the aisle continues toward a loading dock with a metal roll-up shutter. The area beyond the gas canister contains additional pallets, loose packaging materials, and a fire extinguisher mounted on a wall bracket that could be dislodged by a blast.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, head-height camera aligned to the center of the warehouse aisle, looking straight down the corridor. No character body visible.

Tall metal shelving units line both sides stacked with cardboard boxes, forming a long corridor. Overhead sodium lights cast warm hard shadows. A red propane gas canister lies on the ground near a toppled wooden pallet. Open cardboard boxes and crumpled brown paper are scattered around. A thin haze of dust hangs low near the ground.
